title: Bitter Spanish Chicken Stir-fry
description: A tender and meal-prep-friendly dish featuring shredded chicken with a touch of bitterness from roasted bell peppers and garlic. Perfect for any meal time.

ingredients.name: bell peppers, roasted and seeded
ingredients.notes: use sweet bell pepper if possible

instructions: Shred the chicken into strips using a sharp knife or food processor, making sure it's evenly sized for even cooking.
In a large mixing bowl, combine shredded chicken with roasted bell peppers, minced garlic, and optional chili flakes and red pepper flakes. Mix well to coat all pieces thoroughly.
Transfer the mixture onto an oven-safe baking dish lined with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Drizzle olive oil evenly over the chicken mixture ensuring all pieces are coated. Spread out in a single layer if possible to allow for even cooking.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until internal temperature reaches at least 165°F (74°C).
Remove from oven and let it rest before serving.
